name: convexify-with-cvxpy
description: Reformulate optimization problems into CVXPY-solvable convex models.

interface.shortDescription: Reformulate and solve convex CVXPY models
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex convert optimization problems into CVXPY-solvable DCP, DGP, DQCP, conic, relaxed, or sequentially convex models. Includes reusable diagnostics, reformulation patterns, and powered-descent/rocket-landing convexification guidance.
defaultPrompt: Model this as DGP or DQCP.
